{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query is about the usual approach for a nasal antrostomy. Document [16] (Title: Sinus Endoscopic Surgery -- Technique or Treatment -- Maxillary Antrostomy) states 'The natural ostium of the maxillary sinus is visualized after removing the uncinate.
